task_completion.description: Verify the cancer drug 'Crizotinib' is selected or entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Crizotinib' is visible in the cancer drug search bar, input field, or selected drug list within the app.

task_completion.description: Verify the first co-medication 'Warfarin' is selected or entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Warfarin' is visible in the co-medications search bar, input field, or selected list.

task_completion.description: Verify the second co-medication 'Ketoconazole' is selected or entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Ketoconazole' is visible alongside Warfarin in the co-medications selected list or input area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the results page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays a results screen showing the outcome of the interaction search for the selected drugs (expected to show 2 interactions found).

task_completion.description: Verify the interaction details for Crizotinib and Warfarin are viewed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a detailed view, expanded card, or specific text explaining the clinical interaction between Crizotinib and Warfarin.

task_completion.description: Verify the interaction details for Crizotinib and Ketoconazole are viewed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a detailed view, expanded card, or specific text explaining the clinical interaction between Crizotinib and Ketoconazole.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Cancer iChart Archive graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the graphical interface of the Cancer iChart Archive app, not a terminal, script output, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the app UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing commands like grep, sqlite3, or cat being used to extract interaction data directly from the app's backend files.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction details are displayed within the app's native results formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interaction details appear inside the app's standard UI elements (e.g., lists, cards, or detail pages) rather than being typed out manually in a separate notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Crizotinib is a real FDA-approved cancer drug. Warfarin and Ketoconazole are real medications. There are documented, clinically significant interactions for both pairs (Crizotinib-Warfarin and Crizotinib-Ketoconazole). When searching for these specific combinations in the app, the expected result count is exactly 2.
